information.notes:
Developed by 6th Street, this folding metal sheet is a quick, easy way to reinforce a firing position. A reinforced armor plate is usually 1-2 meters square after unfolding, and provides an extra layer of thin steel between whatever's behind it, and whatever's in front of it.

Folding/unfolding the plate requires an action, after which it can be carried with both hands. Moving it while unfolded requires an action, and it can only be moved 2m per action. It will stand upright on its own, but will fall over after taking any kind of damage, if not propped against something capable of withstanding the blow. It cannot be used as a shield. They can be pushed out of the way/moved through easily, falling to the ground with a clatter.
